epigraph.quote: the pub can go to the church to pray & the church can go to the pub – the Red lion to pee

per_stop.quote: Austin (6) was BRILLIANT on the 15m like ride.
David Knier played guitar & sang, John Loker played the mouth organ. They were terrific.
A freezing (almost) cold night. It's really too cold to camp now.
It was a super walk with Tinder.
